title: 【机械动力生电优化】Electricity generation optimization
description:
方便 快速 优化是它的座右铭
此整合包可以在4GB内存下运行机械动力及其附属模组
Convenient, fast and optimized is its motto
This modpack can run the Mechanical Power and its auxiliary modules with 4GB of RAM
body:
## 介绍
此整合包可以在性能规格较为低下的计算机中运行
当然，您也可以关闭机械动力的附属模组来优化性能

## 我做了什么
**高品质的优化**
加入了钠 星光 等优化模组，让fps飙升

实测在4C8T 8G 10人在线的伺服器中  mtsp=14±3

**机械动力**

保留了机械动力的原生玩法的同时优化了游戏性能


**常见问题**

如何安装
采用.mrpack格式

客户端：大部分启动器都能一键导入。

服务端：本mrpack文件已支持



联系我（bug提出）
邮箱：XIAlongxiangmc@hotmail.com

### 提示
您需要安装最新版本以进入服务器
### 兼容性问题

建议使用JAVE18及其以上版本

显然与OPTIFINE（高清修复）不兼容

# 版权相关

### 本整合包有官方运营的服务器，地址：xyfyl.xyz(现已停运)
# English edition
## Introduction
This modpack can be run on computers with lower performance specifications
Of course, you can also turn off the mechanical power of the auxiliary mod to optimize performance

## What I did
**High Quality Optimization**

Optimized mods such as Sodium Starlight have been added to make the FPS soar

**Mechanical Power**

The original gameplay of mechanical power is retained while optimizing game performance


**Frequently asked questions**

How to install
In .mrpack format

Client: Most launchers can be imported with one click.
Server: Not yet created

Contact me (bug raised)
E-mail: XIAlongxiangmc@hotmail.com

Copyright
There's nothing you can't.
